data.title: Leaf Agriculture introduces LeafLake, a data analysis product, revolutionizing agribusiness.
data.description: Leaf Agriculture unveiled a groundbreaking product called LeafLake on January 29, 2026. With this new offering, Leaf introduces advanced data analysis capabilities to its customers, enabling them to conduct intricate analysis on their Planted and Applied data. Through LeafLake, customers can effortlessly navigate through comprehensive data sets, enhancing their overall experience with Leaf's services.

data.title: Corning surpasses Q4 forecasts with $4.412 billion revenue, driven by AI-fueled optical business surge. Earnings reported at 72 cents per share.
data.description: Corning Inc. (NYSE: GLW) exceeded expectations in their fourth-quarter results, with revenue totaling $4.412 billion, surpassing the consensus estimate of $4.365 billion. The company's strong performance was attributed to high demand in Optical Communications from AI products, solid Specialty Materials results, and a steady Display sector. Analyst Samik Chatterjee from JPMorgan, who has given Corning an Overweight rating and set a price target of $115, noted that despite lower-than-expected gross margins due to challenges in Solar, the company still achieved earnings of 72 cents per share. These positive results have led to a promising first-quarter forecast hinting at a growth acceleration in revenue. For further details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Renew Biotechnologies partners with Path Fertility to provide NOA Guide epigenetic diagnostic test for men; helps in surgical decisions.
data.description: Today, in Pleasant Grove, Utah, Renew Biotechnologies revealed its involvement as the clinical testing provider for Path Fertility's NOA Guide. The NOA Guide is an epigenetic diagnostic test created to assist in surgical decision-making for males with non-obstructive conditions. This new test aims to provide crucial information to aid in medical procedures, and it marks a significant advancement in the field.

data.title: Wolfspeed launches new TOLT portfolio to meet AI datacenter demand, improves power density and thermal performance.
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, Wolfspeed has revealed its latest TOLT portfolio to meet the growing demand in AI datacenters. This new TOLT (TO-Leaded, Top-Side Cooled) package, utilizing Wolfspeed’s Gen 4 MOSFET technology, offers enhanced power density and thermal performance. Specifically designed to cater to the rising power and cooling requirements of AI and hyperscale datacenters, TOLT brings innovation with its capabilities.

data.title: Lee Enterprises to hold webcast on Feb 10, 2026, for Q4 results ended Dec 28, 2025. Operating in 72 markets. (Words: 98)
data.description: Lee Enterprises, Incorporated (NASDAQ: LEE), a key player in the subscription and advertising sector as well as a top supplier of reliable local news and information across 72 markets, is set to host an audio webcast and conference call on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, starting at 9 a.m. CT. On the agenda is the preliminary results for the quarter concluding on December 28, 2025, with a news release expected before the market opens on the same day.

data.title: Fintech pioneer Adam E. Gordon joins Membrane Labs as Strategic Advisor; largest shareholder, institutional digital asset management platform.
data.description: In a recent press release on January 29, 2026, it was announced that Adam E. Gordon, a leading figure in the fintech industry and a significant shareholder in Membrane Labs, will be taking on the role of Strategic Advisor to the CEO and Executive Team. Membrane Labs, a prominent institutional digital asset management platform, shared the news of Gordon's appointment to the company.
The US to sell $77 bln in 6-Month bills on February 2nd, to settle on February 5th.

data.title: GLCU and Takara introduce DREAM to address mortgage lock-in effect, benefiting members and housing market.
data.description: Great Lakes Credit Union (GLCU) in Bannockburn, Ill., and Takara in New York have partnered to introduce DREAM (Discount for Real Estate Affordability and Mobility) to tackle a critical issue in the housing and mortgage sectors. The initiative aims to combat the mortgage lock-in effect that has impacted numerous Americans, with millions constrained by low-rate mortgages that hinder their mobility, limit housing inventory, and affect financial stability. DREAM provides a straightforward remedy by offering members a discount to address this issue.

data.title: Perspire Sauna Studio partners with Dose to offer liquid supplements at all locations, enhancing post-sauna wellness.
data.description: As of January 29, 2026, Dose's scientifically endorsed liquid supplements are now being sold at all Perspire Sauna Studio outlets in an effort to enhance customer wellness. This move aims to provide support towards improving guests' health beyond just the sauna experience. Perspire Sauna Studio, recognized as the leading sauna franchise in the nation, offers customers the opportunity to access these supplements to further enhance their wellness routines.

data.title: RBFCU and True Sky Federal Credit Union approve merger agreement, combining storied credit unions.
data.description: Two well-established credit unions, Randolph-Brooks Federal Credit Union (RBFCU) and True Sky Federal Credit Union, rooted in aviation, are joining forces in Live Oak, Texas. The boards of directors at RBFCU and True Sky unanimously approved the merger on January 29, 2026. This collaboration will bring together the assets and membership bases of both credit unions to create a stronger financial institution moving forward. The merger marks a significant milestone in the aviation community, with RBFCU holding assets of $10 billion and True Sky with assets totaling $500 million.

data.title: ALGO may hit $0.14 by Feb 2026, with potential for 23% gains. Experts predict $0.16-$0.19 in medium term despite bearish signals.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Algorand (ALGO) has the potential to increase by 23%, aiming to break through the resistance at $0.14. Analysts predict a medium-term range of $0.16 to $0.19, despite current signals indicating a bearish market momentum.

data.title: Global conveyor system market to hit USD 11.9B by 2035 from USD 6.9B in 2025, showing a CAGR of 5.5%.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, as of January 29, 2026, industry data shows that the global conveyor system market is expected to grow significantly, reaching a value of USD 11.9 billion by 2035. This marks a substantial increase from its estimated worth of USD 6.9 billion in 2025. The projected growth indicates a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.5% over the forecast period. This data underscores the market's upward trajectory and potential for expansion in the coming years.

data.title: Marriott Bonvoy hosts "Pup Rally" adoption events for Puppy Bowl XXII, bringing dogs to hotels in Big Game teams' hometowns on Feb. 8.
data.description: Marriott Bonvoy, the Official Hospitality Partner of Puppy Bowl XXII, will be hosting adoptable puppies at hotels in the hometowns of the teams competing in the Big Game on February 8. This initiative is set to take place in various cities on Feb. 8, 2026, including Bethesda, Md. The lovable pups will showcase their special talents in bringing joy through wagging tails and cheerful smiles as part of the heartwarming event. Further details and locations will be revealed closer to the date.
